Dear foreigner,
Many protestors do not allowed by the police to find lawyers. We have many protestors coming out after arrested being hit violently by the police inside the police stations. Some even being sexually mistreated. There are females that cry for weeks in the hospital and mentally cannot speak out what happened. Recently, police even said that raping the protestors is just very usual. We all Hong Kong people are in threatened that we have no any freedom at all. We don’t know when and where police appear and catch any people they dislike back and mistreat them violently. We are fear, however we never give up, otherwise those victims will never forgive us. The dead protesters are staying in our heart forever, we never betray them. We will reach a world that full of peace and love. May be the economy will never as better than before, but we have no any regret. We, teenagers, make the choice. Freedom is the sunlight and money is just dust.
We will fly through The Sun.
